SEARCH
Package com.boschrexroth.api

Interface MetadataBuilder

public interface MetadataBuilder
This module provides helper classes to deal with metadata flatbuffers. 

 int mask = AllowedOperation.createMask(AllowedOperation.READ, AllowedOperation.BROWSE);
 MetadataBuilder mb = MetadataBuilder.create(mask, "test", "test_url");
 mb.setUnit("[m/s]");
 mb.setDisplayName("Name");
 mb.setNodeClass(NodeClass.Variable);
 mb.setDisplayFormat(DisplayFormat.Dec);
 Variant v = mb.build();
 ...
 byte[] vals = v.getFlatbuffers();
 MetadataT m = MetadataT.deserializeFromBinary(vals);
